events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a vacuum decay test that did not hold at target microns during HVAC-R brazing & evacuation work. This is a non-compliant condition - the system failed the evacuation/decay test, meaning there's likely moisture, non-condensables, or leaks in the system. This is a fail.

  "actions": [
    "Identify and repair leak sources or moisture ingress points in the brazed system",
    "Re-evacuate system using proper vacuum pump and micron gauge to manufacturer-specified target",
    "Re-perform vacuum decay test and confirm micron rise stays within allowable limit over required hold period",
    "Do not charge system with refrigerant until evacuation acceptance criteria are verified and documented"
  ],
  "rationale": "The vacuum decay test did not hold at target microns, which means the system has not achieved the required evacuation level per manufacturer specs and industry standards. Charging a system that fails evacuation risks moisture and non-condensable contamination, compressor damage, and EPA 608 compliance issues. Work is non-compliant at rough-complete stage and must be reworked before proceeding.",
